say.label: You've followed the metronome a hundred times.
Tonight, you don't have to move at all. I'll take it from here.
Welcome to The Fucking Machine Tease. I'm so glad you're here.
Every tick of the metronome you're about to hear isn't meant for you — it's meant for the machine.
The same metronome you already know moves a real machine, in real time.
It quickens,
it slows,
it lingers and it drives...
... and all you have to do is lie back and let me set the pace.
Truly hands-free. Slow and teasing, or relentless — tonight every rhythm is mine to choose, and yours to feel.
It truly does sound amazing, doesn't it?
Before we begin, there are a few things you will need:

🔌 A fucking machine — see 'Supported Devices' on the right.
                                                💻 The HismithController app — Windows PC only (download instructions come later).
                  📶 Bluetooth — your PC must be able to connect to Bluetooth devices.
💦 Plenty of lube — more than you think.

No machine? You can still play.  Just ease a dildo in and out in time with each tick of the metronome. It's not quite the hands-free surrender I'd love to give you, but every rhythm I choose is still yours to feel.
So… shall we begin?
I'm so glad you are here! 🩷

If this is your first time, you will want to start with the Application Setup, where your will install, pair and test your machine.
Then, move on to the Tutorial — a short, gentle run so you can feel how it responds.
When you think you are ready for it, you can move on to the real thing — The Fucking Machine Tease.
More info on the model, the creator of this tease and support can be found in the About section.
Before I can take over, let's make sure everything's working — together.
This part is just setup. We'll get the app running, connect your machine, and check that it responds to the beat.
You won't be using the machine on yourself yet — for now we're only watching to confirm it all works. The real fun comes later.
Take your time. I'll be right here.
First, a little preparation.

1. Download HismithController from the GitHub releases page: github.com/SimonsSecrets/hismith-bt-controller/releases
2. Set up your Hismith Pro 1 — mount it securely, attach your accessory, and turn it on so it's ready to pair over Bluetooth.
                    No need to point it at yourself yet — just have it switched on and within reach.
3. Start the HismithController app
💡 If Windows shows a blue 'Windows protected your PC' screen, that's normal for a small app like this one. Click 'More info', then 'Run anyway' to continue.
Now let's introduce them to each other.

1. If this is the first time you run the app, click 'Get started'.
2. On the connection screen, click 'Scan for devices'.
3. When your Hismith appears in the list, tap to select it, then click 'Connect'.
🔍 Don't see your device? Make sure it's switched on, your PC's Bluetooth is enabled, and the machine isn't already paired to something else. Click 'Scan for devices' again to retry.
[SAY: Once you're connected, you'll land on the main screen with the Manual / Sound mode toggle at the top.
Let's make sure your machine listens to you first.

1. Make sure the Manual tab is selected.
2. Under Speed control, either type a value into SPEED (%) or tap one of the PRESETS.
3. Watch your machine — it should ramp smoothly up to the speed you set.
Feel free to play with a few values. When you've seen it respond, bring it back down to a stop.
Now the part that makes this special — letting the metronome drive it.
The app listens to whatever sound your PC is playing, so first make sure it can hear sounds coming from this tease:

🔊 Play this tease on the same Windows PC the app is running on.
🔉 Turn your volume up and make sure you're not muted.
🎧 Keep the sound coming out of that PC — if your audio goes to a separate speaker or a Bluetooth headset, the app may not hear it.
Switch to the Sound tab and let the metronome on this page play. Within a few seconds you should see the MUSIC readout showing a live bpm, and the visualizer bars moving in time with the beat.
That means the app can hear me. Once you see the beat being picked up, you're ready for the next step.
This is the moment everything's been leading to.
Press the play button in the centre of the visualizer.
Watch your machine fall into rhythm with the metronome — speeding up and easing off exactly with the beat.
That's me, moving it. No hands, no effort from you — just the beat.

While it's running, find the emergency stop — just press Alt+Space and everything halts instantly.
Try it once now, so your fingers know exactly where it is before you ever need it.
Perfect. Everything's working.
Your machine connects, it responds, and it moves to the beat. That's all we needed to see.
When you're ready to actually feel it, head to the Tutorial — I'll guide you through your first real run... gently, I promise.
No rush now. This first time is all about you getting comfortable with me.

🍆 Choose a dildo you're completely comfortable with
for your first time, go smaller and familiar, never bigger. Too much and this becomes far too intense; the right size lets you relax and enjoy.

💦 Lube generously
far more than feels necessary. Then add a little more.

🎚️ In the app's Sound mode, set THRUST RHYTHM to 1 beat per stroke
so every tick of the metronome is one full, deliberate stroke. Then, hit the play button, so the app is listening for sound.

🛑 Emergency stop is still just Alt+Space, any time you need it.
Before I take over, let's get you settled onto the machine — at your own pace.

First, position yourself against the dildo and, slowly, ease yourself onto it.
Then gently move up and down all the way along its length — no machine yet, just you — until it feels easy and comfortable.
Be sure to add more lube if you need it. There's no rush at all.
Take a slow breath. When you're ready, and not a moment before, I will take control.
Here we go. Stay just like that for me… let the anticipation build.
There it is. Feel me start to move.
Slow… easy… there's nowhere to be but right here.
Don't tense up. Let it glide. Let me do all the work.
…and stop. Feel that sudden emptiness? Hold onto that wanting for me.
Here I come again — a little more sure of myself this time.
Breathe with it. In… and out… let every stroke sink in a little deeper.
See how easy this is? You don't have to do a thing. Just feel.
Quiet again. I love teasing you like this — wanting just a little more than I'm giving.
Mmm, there. Just enough to keep you needing it.
And gone again. Patience. I decide when you get more.
Back so soon? You're starting to crave the beat now, aren't you.
Feel how much you miss it the instant it stops. That ache is the whole point.
Now… let me show you just a little more.
Feel me quicken? A hint of how relentless I can be when I really want you.
That's it — let go, let it build…
…faster — feel that? That's barely the beginning.
…and that's where I'll leave you.
Aching, wet, and wanting — exactly how you should be before the real thing.
Everything you just felt? That was me being gentle. If you dare, start the real tease and find out what happens when I'm not.
So… do you think you can handle some real fucking now?
So. You came back for the real thing.
Welcome to The Fucking Machine Tease — the one I've been saving for you.
No more gentle introductions, no more easing you in. Tonight I take over completely… and you will let me.
Before we begin, here's what you're agreeing to.
This runs about 20 minutes — and then I don't stop. I keep going until you fall apart for me, however long that takes.
So get everything you need within reach now. Once I start, I really don't like to stop.

** About **

🫦 The model — every image in this tease is of the lovely Leah Gotti.

🧩 The app and the tease — HismithController and this tease were created by SimonsSecrets.

❤️ Enjoying it? You can show support and buy me a coffee at ko-fi.com/simonssecrets. It genuinely helps.

💬 Found a bug, or want your machine supported? I'd love to help.
Please get in touch at simonssecrets@gmail.com. Your reports and requests are exactly what makes the next version better.

✅ Confirmed working
• Hismith Premium 3.0 Pro (AK-01 Series)

👍 Should work — same legacy protocol (but not tested)
• Table Top 2.0 / 2.0 Pro / Max, Double Penetration (2.0 Pro)
• Pro Traveler, Capsule, G011, Thrusting Cup, Wildolo.

❌ Not yet supported — These will probably connect but won't respond to the app.
• Premium 4.0 Pro, Hismith Servo / Servok, Hismith Mini Pro
•  The newer HISMITH S1 / S2 / S3 and Premium 4.0 generation
💬 Not sure, or don't see your machine? Just connect it once — the app reads the model when it pairs. And if your device isn't supported yet, get in touch at simonssecrets@gmail.com.
